problem_text_cn: 绝热气缸内理想气体，活塞缓慢推进，分子与活塞弹性碰撞增加动能，导出T-V表述的绝热过程方程（绝热指数γ为常量）。
problem_text_en: Ideal gas in an adiabatic cylinder，the piston is pushed forward slowly，molecules gain kinetic energy through elastic collision with the piston，derive the adiabatic process equation expressed by T-V（adiabatic index γ is constant）。
problem_solution_cn: （1）分子碰撞动能增量：- 麦克斯韦速度分布，分子与活塞碰撞后x方向速度增量2u，动能增量2m vₓ u，积分得dU=-nkT dV。（2）绝热过程方程：- 内能增量dU=C_V dT=νR dT/(γ-1)，联立得dT/T + (γ-1)dV/V=0，积分得TV^(γ-1)=常量。
problem_solution_en: （1）Kinetic energy increment from molecular collision：- Maxwell velocity distribution，the x-direction velocity increment of molecules after collision with the piston is 2u，kinetic energy increment is 2m vₓ u，integrating gives dU=-nkT dV。（2）Adiabatic process equation：- Internal energy increment dU=C_V dT=νR dT/(γ-1)，combining gives dT/T + (γ-1)dV/V=0，integrating gives TV^(γ-1)=constant。
problem_answer: 绝热过程方程为$T V^{\gamma-1}=常量$
